title: neottia pseudonipponica
intro: Neottia pseudonipponica, also known as the Japanese tooth-awned orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neottia pseudonipponica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried roots or extracts, and is typically taken in capsule or tea form to promote overall well-being.
